3.question: list users of this project
3.sql:
SELECT 
    cu.MtCommitteeUsers_Id,
    cu.MtCommitteeHeader_Id,
    cu.RuUsers_Id,
    cu.RuRoles_Code,
    cu.MtCommitteeUsers_EffectiveFrom,
    cu.MtCommitteeUsers_EffectiveTo,
    u.RuUsers_FirstName,
    u.RuUsers_LastName,
    u.RuUsers_EmailAddress,
    u.RuUsers_PrimaryContact
FROM 
    MtCommitteeUsers cu
INNER JOIN 
    RuUsers u ON cu.RuUsers_Id = u.RuUsers_Id
WHERE 
    cu.MtCommitteeUsers_Isdeleted = 0
    AND u.RuUsers_IsDeleted = 0
ORDER BY 
    u.RuUsers_FirstName ASC

4.question: list users of this project
4.sql:
SELECT 
    cu.MtCommitteeUsers_Id,
    cu.MtCommitteeHeader_Id,
    cu.RuUsers_Id,
    cu.RuRoles_Code,
    cu.MtCommitteeUsers_EffectiveFrom,
    cu.MtCommitteeUsers_EffectiveTo,

5.question: list all distinct users of this project
5.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT
    u.RuUsers_Id,
    u.RuUsers_FirstName,
    u.RuUsers_LastName,
    u.RuUsers_DomainUserName,
    u.RuUsers_UserType,
    u.RuOrganizations_Code,
    u.RuUsers_GenderCode,
    u.RuUsers_IsAdmin,
    u.RuUsers_DesignationCode,
    u.RuUsers_EmailAddress,
    u.RuUsers_PrimaryContact,
    u.RuUsers_SecondaryContact,
    u.RuUsers_CreatedOn,
    u.RuUsers_ModifiedOn
FROM
    RuUsers u
LEFT JOIN
    MtCommitteeUsers cu ON u.RuUsers_Id = cu.RuUsers_Id AND cu.MtCommitteeUsers_Isdeleted = 0
WHERE
    u.RuUsers_IsDeleted = 0
ORDER BY
    u.RuUsers_FirstName ASC

6.question: How many meetings this month?
6.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS TotalMeetingsThisMonth FROM MtMeetingHeader WHERE MONTH(MtMeetingHeader_MeetingDate) = MONTH(GETDATE()) AND YEAR(MtMeetingHeader_MeetingDate) = YEAR(GETDATE()) AND MtMeetingHeader_Isdeleted = 0

7.question: which committee organizes most meetinhs
7.sql:
SELECT TOP 1
    c.MtCommitteeHeader_Id,
    c.MtCommitteeHeader_Name,
    COUNT(m.MtMeetingHeader_Id) AS TotalMeetings
FROM
    MtCommitteeHeader c
INNER JOIN
    MtMeetingHeader m ON c.MtCommitteeHeader_Id = m.MtCommitteeHeader_Id
WHERE
    m.MtMeetingHeader_Isdeleted = 0
GROUP BY
    c.MtCommitteeHeader_Id,
    c.MtCommitteeHeader_Name
ORDER BY
    TotalMeetings DESC

10.question: which committee has most members?
10.sql:
SELECT TOP 1
    c.MtCommitteeHeader_Id,
    c.MtCommitteeHeader_Name,
    COUNT(cu.RuUsers_Id) AS TotalMembers
FROM
    MtCommitteeHeader c
INNER JOIN
    MtCommitteeUsers cu ON c.MtCommitteeHeader_Id = cu.MtCommitteeHeader_Id
WHERE
    cu.MtCommitteeUsers_Isdeleted = 0
GROUP BY
    c.MtCommitteeHeader_Id,
    c.MtCommitteeHeader_Name
ORDER BY
    TotalMembers DESC

11.question: which committee has least members?
11.sql:
SELECT TOP 1
    c.MtCommitteeHeader_Id,
    c.MtCommitteeHeader_Name,
    COUNT(cu.RuUsers_Id) AS TotalMembers
FROM
    MtCommitteeHeader c
INNER JOIN
    MtCommitteeUsers cu ON c.MtCommitteeHeader_Id = cu.MtCommitteeHeader_Id
WHERE
    cu.MtCommitteeUsers_Isdeleted = 0
GROUP BY
    c.MtCommitteeHeader_Id,
    c.MtCommitteeHeader_Name
ORDER BY
    TotalMembers ASC

15.question: how many agendas are created till today
15.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS TotalAgendas FROM MtMeetingAgenda WHERE MtMeetingAgenda_Isdeleted = 0 AND MtMeetingAgenda_CreatedOn <= GETDATE()

16.question: how many agendas and MOM attached with the meeting '18 may all emails send'
16.sql:
SELECT 
    m.MtMeetingHeader_Id,
    m.MtMeetingHeader_Title,
    COUNT(DISTINCT a.MtMeetingAgenda_Id) AS TotalAgendas,
    COUNT(DISTINCT c.mtMeetingSphereCommentsDetail_Id) AS TotalMOMs
FROM 
    MtMeetingHeader m
LEFT JOIN 
    MtMeetingAgenda a ON m.MtMeetingHeader_Id = a.MtMeetingHeader_Id 
    AND a.MtMeetingAgenda_Isdeleted = 0
LEFT JOIN 
    mtMeetingSphereCommentsDetail c ON m.MtMeetingHeader_Id = c.mtMeetingSphereCommentsDetail_SourceHeaderId 
    AND c.mtMeetingSphereCommentsDetail_IsDeleted = 0
WHERE 
    m.MtMeetingHeader_Title LIKE '%18 may all emails send%'
    AND m.MtMeetingHeader_Isdeleted = 0
GROUP BY 
    m.MtMeetingHeader_Id,
    m.MtMeetingHeader_Title

17.question: can you name the attachment used in the agenda = 'sd'
17.sql: SELECT a.MtMeetingAgenda_Id, a.MtMeetingAgenda_Title, att.MtAttachment_FileName, att.MtAttachment_FileExtension, att.MtAttachment_FileSizeBytes FROM MtMeetingAgenda a INNER JOIN MtAttachment att ON a.MtMeetingAgenda_Id = att.MtAttachment_SourceId WHERE a.MtMeetingAgenda_Title LIKE '%sd%' AND a.MtMeetingAgenda_Isdeleted = 0 AND att.MtAttachment_IsDeleted = 0

18.question: list female users

    RuUsers_Id,
    RuUsers_FirstName,
    RuUsers_LastName,
    RuUsers_DomainUserName,
    RuUsers_UserType,
    RuOrganizations_Code,
    RuUsers_GenderCode,
    RuUsers_IsAdmin,
    RuUsers_DesignationCode,
    RuUsers_EmailAddress,
    RuUsers_PrimaryContact,
    RuUsers_SecondaryContact
FROM
    RuUsers
WHERE
    RuUsers_GenderCode LIKE '%female%'

23.question: name recent meeting
23.sql:
SELECT TOP 1
    MtMeetingHeader_Id,
    MtMeetingHeader_Title,
    MtMeetingHeader_MeetingDate,
    MtMeetingHeader_MeetingStartTime,
    MtMeetingHeader_Organizer,
    LuMeetingSphereLookups_StatusCode
FROM
    MtMeetingHeader
WHERE
    MtMeetingHeader_Isdeleted = 0
    AND MtMeetingHeader_MeetingDate <= GETDATE()
ORDER BY
    MtMeetingHeader_MeetingDate DESC

24.question: list members of 14AP COM committee
24.sql:
SELECT 
    u.RuUsers_Id,
    u.RuUsers_FirstName,
    u.RuUsers_LastName,
    u.RuUsers_EmailAddress,
    u.RuUsers_PrimaryContact,
    cu.RuRoles_Code,
    cu.MtCommitteeUsers_EffectiveFrom,
    cu.MtCommitteeUsers_EffectiveTo
FROM 
    MtCommitteeUsers cu
INNER JOIN 
    RuUsers u ON cu.RuUsers_Id = u.RuUsers_Id
INNER JOIN 
    MtCommitteeHeader c ON cu.MtCommitteeHeader_Id = c.MtCommitteeHeader_Id
WHERE 
    c.MtCommitteeHeader_Name LIKE '%14AP COM%'
    AND cu.MtCommitteeUsers_Isdeleted = 0
    AND u.RuUsers_IsDeleted = 0
ORDER BY 
    u.RuUsers_FirstName ASC

26.question: list just user names of this committee
26.sql:
SELECT
    u.RuUsers_Id,
    u.RuUsers_FirstName,
    u.RuUsers_LastName
FROM
    RuUsers u
INNER JOIN
    MtCommitteeUsers cu ON u.RuUsers_Id = cu.RuUsers_Id
INNER JOIN
    MtCommitteeHeader c ON cu.MtCommitteeHeader_Id = c.MtCommitteeHeader_Id
WHERE
    c.MtCommitteeHeader_Id = (
        SELECT TOP 1
            m.MtCommitteeHeader_Id
        FROM
            MtMeetingHeader m
        WHERE
            m.MtMeetingHeader_Isdeleted = 0
            AND m.MtMeetingHeader_MeetingDate <= GETDATE()
        ORDER BY
            m.MtMeetingHeader_MeetingDate DESC
    )
    AND cu.MtCommitteeUsers_Isdeleted = 0

27.question: how many agendas attached in meeting meetin gen
27.sql:
SELECT 
    m.MtMeetingHeader_Id,
    m.MtMeetingHeader_Title,
    COUNT(a.MtMeetingAgenda_Id) AS TotalAgendas
FROM 
    MtMeetingHeader m
LEFT JOIN 
    MtMeetingAgenda a ON m.MtMeetingHeader_Id = a.MtMeetingHeader_Id 
    AND a.MtMeetingAgenda_Isdeleted = 0
WHERE 
    m.MtMeetingHeader_Title LIKE '%meetin gen%'
    AND m.MtMeetingHeader_Isdeleted = 0
GROUP BY 
    m.MtMeetingHeader_Id,
    m.MtMeetingHeader_Title

28.question: list users of Dev Team 1 committee

30.question: give me the list of meetings in which eman is as a secratary
30.sql:
SELECT 
    mh.MtMeetingHeader_Id,
    mh.MtMeetingHeader_Title,
    mh.MtMeetingHeader_MeetingDate,
    mh.MtMeetingHeader_MeetingStartTime,
    mh.MtMeetingHeader_Organizer,
    mh.LuMeetingSphereLookups_StatusCode,
    cu.RuRoles_Code,
    u.RuUsers_FirstName,
    u.RuUsers_LastName
FROM 
    RuUsers u
INNER JOIN 
    MtCommitteeUsers cu ON u.RuUsers_Id = cu.RuUsers_Id
INNER JOIN 
    MtMeetingHeader mh ON cu.MtCommitteeHeader_Id = mh.MtCommitteeHeader_Id
WHERE 
    (u.RuUsers_FirstName LIKE '%eman%' OR u.RuUsers_LastName LIKE '%eman%')
    AND cu.MtCommitteeUsers_Isdeleted = 0
    AND u.RuUsers_IsDeleted = 0
    AND mh.MtMeetingHeader_Isdeleted = 0
    AND cu.RuRoles_Code = 'SECRETARY'
ORDER BY 
    mh.MtMeetingHeader_MeetingDate DESC,
    mh.MtMeetingHeader_Title;

31.question: list meetings that are cancelled?
31.sql:
SELECT 
    m.MtMeetingHeader_Id,
    m.MtMeetingHeader_Title,
    m.MtMeetingHeader_MeetingDate,
    m.MtMeetingHeader_MeetingStartTime,
    m.MtMeetingHeader_Organizer,
    m.MtMeetingHeader_Description,
    m.MtMeetingHeader_Meeting_Link,
    m.LuMeetingSphereLookups_StatusCode,
    m.MtMeetingHeader_OtherAddress
FROM MtMeetingHeader AS m
WHERE m.MtMeetingHeader_Isdeleted = 0
  AND m.LuMeetingSphereLookups_StatusCode = '0'
ORDER BY m.MtMeetingHeader_MeetingDate DESC;

32.question: who is the secretary in 18 may all emails send meeting
32.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT
    u.RuUsers_Id,
    u.RuUsers_FirstName,
    u.RuUsers_LastName,
    u.RuUsers_EmailAddress,
    u.RuUsers_DomainUserName
FROM MtMeetingHeader AS m
INNER JOIN MtCommitteeHeader AS c
    ON m.MtCommitteeHeader_Id = c.MtCommitteeHeader_Id
INNER JOIN MtCommitteeUsers AS cu
    ON c.MtCommitteeHeader_Id = cu.MtCommitteeHeader_Id
INNER JOIN RuUsers AS u
    ON cu.RuUsers_Id = u.RuUsers_Id
WHERE m.MtMeetingHeader_Isdeleted = 0
  AND cu.MtCommitteeUsers_Isdeleted = 0
  AND u.RuUsers_IsDeleted = 0
  AND m.MtMeetingHeader_Title LIKE '%18 may all emails send%'
  AND cu.RuRoles_Code LIKE '%secretary%';

33.question: who is the secretary in 18 may all emails send meeting
33.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT
    u.RuUsers_Id,
    u.RuUsers_FirstName,
    u.RuUsers_LastName,
    u.RuUsers_EmailAddress,
    u.RuUsers_DomainUserName
FROM MtMeetingHeader AS m
INNER JOIN MtCommitteeHeader AS c
    ON m.MtCommitteeHeader_Id = c.MtCommitteeHeader_Id
INNER JOIN MtCommitteeUsers AS cu
    ON c.MtCommitteeHeader_Id = cu.MtCommitteeHeader_Id
INNER JOIN RuUsers AS u
    ON cu.RuUsers_Id = u.RuUsers_Id
WHERE m.MtMeetingHeader_Isdeleted = 0
  AND cu.MtCommitteeUsers_Isdeleted = 0
  AND u.RuUsers_IsDeleted = 0
  AND m.MtMeetingHeader_Title LIKE '%18 may all emails send%'
  AND cu.RuRoles_Code LIKE '%secretary%';

34.question: is there any member whose name is Eman
34.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT
    u.RuUsers_Id,
    u.RuUsers_FirstName,
    u.RuUsers_LastName,
    u.RuUsers_EmailAddress,
    u.RuUsers_DomainUserName
FROM RuUsers AS u
INNER JOIN MtCommitteeUsers AS cu
    ON u.RuUsers_Id = cu.RuUsers_Id
WHERE u.RuUsers_IsDeleted = 0
  AND cu.MtCommitteeUsers_Isdeleted = 0
  AND cu.RuRoles_Code LIKE '%member%'
  AND (u.RuUsers_FirstName LIKE '%Eman%' OR u.RuUsers_LastName LIKE '%Eman%');

35.question: name the meeting which has MOm attachment 'Zorlu EPA'
35.sql:
SELECT 
    m.MtMeetingHeader_Id,
    m.MtMeetingHeader_Title,
    minutes.MtMeetingMOM_Id,
    minutes.MtMeetingMOM_Title
FROM MtMeetingHeader AS m
INNER JOIN MtMeetingMOM AS minutes
    ON m.MtMeetingHeader_Id = minutes.MtMeetingHeader_Id
WHERE m.MtMeetingHeader_Isdeleted = 0
  AND minutes.MtMeetingMOM_Isdeleted = 0
  AND minutes.MtMeetingMOM_Title LIKE '%Zorlu EPA%';

36.question: list shared documents
36.sql:
SELECT 
    att.MtAttachment_Id,
    att.MtAttachment_Source,
    att.MtAttachment_SourceId,
    att.MtAttachment_FileName,
    att.MtAttachment_FileExtension,
    att.MtAttachment_FileSizeBytes,
    att.MtAttachment_EcmFileId,
    att.MtAttachment_CreatedOn,
    sd.MtSharedDocumentsHeader_Id,
    sd.MtSharedDocumentsHeader_Title
FROM MtAttachment AS att
INNER JOIN MtSharedDocumentsHeader AS sd
    ON att.MtAttachment_Source = 'SharedDocument'
   AND att.MtAttachment_SourceId = sd.MtSharedDocumentsHeader_Id
WHERE att.MtAttachment_IsDeleted = 0
  AND sd.MtSharedDocumentsHeader_IsDeleted = 0;

37.question: list attachments of 4J Meeting meeting
37.sql:
SELECT 
    m.MtMeetingHeader_Id,
    m.MtMeetingHeader_Title,
    att.MtAttachment_Id,
    att.MtAttachment_Source,
    att.MtAttachment_SourceId,
    att.MtAttachment_FileName,
    att.MtAttachment_FileExtension,
    att.MtAttachment_FileSizeBytes,
    att.MtAttachment_EcmFileId,
    att.MtAttachment_CreatedOn
FROM MtMeetingHeader AS m
INNER JOIN MtAttachment AS att
    ON att.MtAttachment_SourceId = m.MtMeetingHeader_Id
WHERE m.MtMeetingHeader_Isdeleted = 0
  AND att.MtAttachment_IsDeleted = 0
  AND m.MtMeetingHeader_Title = '4J Meeting';

38.question: name all the meetings that are scheduled in location CPPAOFFICEISLAMABAD
38.sql:
SELECT 
    MtMeetingHeader_Id,
    MtMeetingHeader_Title,
    MtMeetingHeader_MeetingDate,
    MtMeetingHeader_MeetingStartTime,
    MtMeetingHeader_Organizer,
    MtMeetingHeader_Description,
    MtMeetingHeader_Meeting_Link,
    LuMeetingSphereLookups_StatusCode,
    MtMeetingHeader_OtherAddress
FROM MtMeetingHeader
WHERE MtMeetingHeader_Isdeleted = 0
  AND MtMeetingHeader_MeetingDate >= CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)
  AND LuMeetingSphereLookups_LocationCode = 'CPPAOFFICEISLAMABAD'
ORDER BY MtMeetingHeader_MeetingDate ASC;

39.question: list all meetings of meeting profile "Dev Team Testing"
39.sql:
SELECT 
    m.MtMeetingHeader_Id,
    m.MtMeetingHeader_Title,
    m.MtMeetingHeader_MeetingDate,
    m.MtMeetingHeader_MeetingStartTime,
    m.MtMeetingHeader_Organizer,
    m.MtMeetingHeader_Description,
    m.MtMeetingHeader_Meeting_Link,
    m.LuMeetingSphereLookups_StatusCode,
    m.LuMeetingSphereLookups_LocationCode,
    m.MtMeetingHeader_OtherAddress,
    c.MtCommitteeHeader_Id,
    c.MtCommitteeHeader_Name,
    p.RuMeetingProfile_Id,
    p.RuMeetingProfile_Name
FROM MtMeetingHeader AS m
INNER JOIN MtCommitteeHeader AS c
    ON m.MtCommitteeHeader_Id = c.MtCommitteeHeader_Id
INNER JOIN RuMeetingProfile AS p
    ON c.RuMeetingProfile_Id = p.RuMeetingProfile_Id
WHERE m.MtMeetingHeader_Isdeleted = 0
  AND c.MtCommitteeHeader_Isdeleted = 0
  AND p.RuMeetingProfile_Name LIKE '%Dev committee Testing%'
ORDER BY m.MtMeetingHeader_MeetingDate DESC;

40.question: provide the shared documents of committee April Committee , and their description
40.sql:
SELECT 
    c.MtCommitteeHeader_Id,
    c.MtCommitteeHeader_Name,
    s.MtSharedDocumentsHeader_Id,
    s.MtSharedDocumentsHeader_Title,
    s.MtSharedDocumentsHeader_Description,
    a.MtAttachment_Id,
    a.MtAttachment_FileName,
    a.MtAttachment_FileExtension,
    a.MtAttachment_FileSizeBytes,
    a.MtAttachment_CreatedOn
FROM MtCommitteeHeader AS c
INNER JOIN MtDocumentCommittee AS dc
    ON c.MtCommitteeHeader_Id = dc.MtCommitteeHeader_Id
INNER JOIN MtSharedDocumentsHeader AS s
    ON dc.MtSharedDocumentsHeader_Id = s.MtSharedDocumentsHeader_Id
INNER JOIN MtAttachment AS a
    ON a.MtAttachment_Source = 'SharedDocument'
   AND a.MtAttachment_SourceId = s.MtSharedDocumentsHeader_Id
WHERE c.MtCommitteeHeader_Name LIKE '%April Committee%'
  AND dc.MtDocumentCommittee_IsDeleted = 0
  AND s.MtSharedDocumentsHeader_IsDeleted = 0
  AND a.MtAttachment_IsDeleted = 0
ORDER BY s.MtSharedDocumentsHeader_CreatedOn DESC, a.MtAttachment_CreatedOn DESC;

41.question: is there any meeting with completed status and is held at 06:30 PM
41.sql:
SELECT 
    m.MtMeetingHeader_Id,
    m.MtMeetingHeader_Title,
    m.MtMeetingHeader_MeetingDate,
    m.MtMeetingHeader_MeetingStartTime,
    m.MtMeetingHeader_Organizer,
    m.MtMeetingHeader_Description,
    m.MtMeetingHeader_Meeting_Link,
    m.LuMeetingSphereLookups_StatusCode,
    m.MtMeetingHeader_OtherAddress
FROM MtMeetingHeader AS m
WHERE m.MtMeetingHeader_Isdeleted = 0
  AND m.LuMeetingSphereLookups_StatusCode = '3'  -- Completed
  AND m.MtMeetingHeader_MeetingStartTime LIKE '%6:30 PM%';

42.question: Muhammad Khubab is in which committees
42.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT
    c.MtCommitteeHeader_Id,
    c.MtCommitteeHeader_Name
FROM RuUsers AS u
INNER JOIN MtCommitteeUsers AS cu
    ON u.RuUsers_Id = cu.RuUsers_Id
INNER JOIN MtCommitteeHeader AS c
    ON cu.MtCommitteeHeader_Id = c.MtCommitteeHeader_Id
WHERE u.RuUsers_IsDeleted = 0
  AND cu.MtCommitteeUsers_Isdeleted = 0
  AND c.MtCommitteeHeader_Isdeleted = 0
  AND (
        (u.RuUsers_FirstName + ' ' + u.RuUsers_LastName) LIKE '%Muhammad Khubab%'
        OR u.RuUsers_FirstName LIKE '%Muhammad%'
        OR u.RuUsers_LastName LIKE '%Khubab%'
      );

43.question: list active committees that were created from june 01 2026 to june 5 2026
43.sql:
SELECT 
    c.MtCommitteeHeader_Id,
    c.MtCommitteeHeader_Name,
    c.RuMeetingProfile_Id,
    c.MtCommitteeHeader_Status,
    c.MtCommitteeHeader_Isdeleted,
    c.MtCommitteeHeader_CreatedBy,
    c.MtCommitteeHeader_CreatedOn
FROM MtCommitteeHeader AS c
WHERE c.MtCommitteeHeader_Isdeleted = 0
  AND c.MtCommitteeHeader_CreatedOn >= '2026-06-01'
  AND c.MtCommitteeHeader_CreatedOn < '2026-06-06'
ORDER BY c.MtCommitteeHeader_CreatedOn;

44.question: list cancelled meetings
44.sql:
SELECT 
    m.MtMeetingHeader_Id,
    m.MtMeetingHeader_Title,
    m.MtMeetingHeader_MeetingDate,
    m.MtMeetingHeader_MeetingStartTime,
    m.MtMeetingHeader_Organizer,
    m.MtMeetingHeader_Description,
    m.MtMeetingHeader_Meeting_Link,
    m.LuMeetingSphereLookups_StatusCode,
    m.MtMeetingHeader_OtherAddress
FROM MtMeetingHeader AS m
WHERE m.MtMeetingHeader_Isdeleted = 0
  AND m.LuMeetingSphereLookups_StatusCode = '0'
ORDER BY m.MtMeetingHeader_MeetingDate DESC;

45.question: was eman present in any of cancelled meetings
45.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT
    m.MtMeetingHeader_Id,
    m.MtMeetingHeader_Title,
    m.MtMeetingHeader_MeetingDate,
    m.MtMeetingHeader_MeetingStartTime,
    m.MtMeetingHeader_Organizer
FROM MtMeetingHeader AS m
INNER JOIN MtCommitteeHeader AS c
    ON m.MtCommitteeHeader_Id = c.MtCommitteeHeader_Id
INNER JOIN MtCommitteeUsers AS cu
    ON c.MtCommitteeHeader_Id = cu.MtCommitteeHeader_Id
INNER JOIN RuUsers AS u
    ON cu.RuUsers_Id = u.RuUsers_Id
WHERE m.MtMeetingHeader_Isdeleted = 0
  AND m.LuMeetingSphereLookups_StatusCode = '0'   -- Cancelled meetings
  AND cu.MtCommitteeUsers_Isdeleted = 0
  AND u.RuUsers_IsDeleted = 0
  AND u.RuUsers_FirstName LIKE '%eman%';

46.question: list pending status meetings
46.sql:
SELECT 
    m.MtMeetingHeader_Id,
    m.MtMeetingHeader_Title,
    m.MtMeetingHeader_MeetingDate,
    m.MtMeetingHeader_MeetingStartTime,
    m.MtMeetingHeader_Organizer,
    m.MtMeetingHeader_Description,
    m.MtMeetingHeader_Meeting_Link,
    m.LuMeetingSphereLookups_StatusCode,
    m.MtMeetingHeader_OtherAddress
FROM MtMeetingHeader AS m
WHERE m.MtMeetingHeader_Isdeleted = 0
  AND m.LuMeetingSphereLookups_StatusCode = '1'  -- Pending
ORDER BY m.MtMeetingHeader_MeetingDate DESC;

47.question: meetings attended by first user?
47.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT
    m.MtMeetingHeader_Id,
    m.MtMeetingHeader_Title,
    m.MtMeetingHeader_MeetingDate,
    m.MtMeetingHeader_MeetingStartTime,
    m.MtMeetingHeader_Organizer
FROM MtMeetingHeader AS m
INNER JOIN MtCommitteeHeader AS c
    ON m.MtCommitteeHeader_Id = c.MtCommitteeHeader_Id
INNER JOIN MtCommitteeUsers AS cu
    ON c.MtCommitteeHeader_Id = cu.MtCommitteeHeader_Id
INNER JOIN RuUsers AS u
    ON cu.RuUsers_Id = u.RuUsers_Id
WHERE m.MtMeetingHeader_Isdeleted = 0
  AND cu.MtCommitteeUsers_Isdeleted = 0
  AND u.RuUsers_IsDeleted = 0
  AND u.RuUsers_Id = (
        SELECT TOP 1
            u2.RuUsers_Id
        FROM MtMeetingHeader AS m2
        INNER JOIN MtCommitteeHeader AS c2
            ON m2.MtCommitteeHeader_Id = c2.MtCommitteeHeader_Id
        INNER JOIN MtCommitteeUsers AS cu2
            ON c2.MtCommitteeHeader_Id = cu2.MtCommitteeHeader_Id
        INNER JOIN RuUsers AS u2
            ON cu2.RuUsers_Id = u2.RuUsers_Id
        WHERE m2.MtMeetingHeader_Isdeleted = 0
          AND cu2.MtCommitteeUsers_Isdeleted = 0
          AND u2.RuUsers_IsDeleted = 0
          AND m2.MtMeetingHeader_Title LIKE '%3J%'
        ORDER BY u2.RuUsers_Id
  );

48.question: list the name of meeting profiles which are effective from 	25-Mar-2026
48.sql:
SELECT 
    mp.RuMeetingProfile_Id,
    mp.RuMeetingProfile_Name,
    mp.RuMeetingProfile_EffectiveFrom,
    mp.RuMeetingProfile_EffectiveTo
FROM RuMeetingProfile AS mp
WHERE mp.RuMeetingProfile_EffectiveFrom = '2026-03-25';

49.question: name the file that is attached in the MoM of meeting 4J Meeting
49.sql:
SELECT 
    att.MtAttachment_FileName
FROM MtMeetingHeader AS m
INNER JOIN MtMeetingMOM AS mom
    ON mom.MtMeetingHeader_Id = m.MtMeetingHeader_Id
INNER JOIN MtAttachment AS att
    ON att.MtAttachment_Source = 'MoM'
   AND att.MtAttachment_SourceId = mom.MtMeetingMOM_Id
WHERE m.MtMeetingHeader_Isdeleted = 0
  AND mom.MtMeetingMOM_Isdeleted = 0
  AND att.MtAttachment_IsDeleted = 0
  AND m.MtMeetingHeader_Title = '4J Meeting';

50.question: How many meetings this month?
50.sql:
SELECT 
    COUNT(*) AS TotalMeetingsThisMonth
FROM MtMeetingHeader
WHERE MtMeetingHeader_Isdeleted = 0
  AND MtMeetingHeader_MeetingDate >= DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(GETDATE()), MONTH(GETDATE()), 1)
  AND MtMeetingHeader_MeetingDate < DATEADD(MONTH, 1, DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(GETDATE()), MONTH(GETDATE()), 1));

51.question: List internal and external members of the latest meeting
51.sql:
SELECT 
    m.MtMeetingHeader_Id,
    m.MtMeetingHeader_Title,
    m.MtMeetingHeader_MeetingDate,
    u.RuUsers_Id,
    u.RuUsers_FirstName,
    u.RuUsers_LastName,
    u.RuUsers_EmailAddress,
    u.RuUsers_UserType,          -- 'Internal' / 'External' as per system configuration
    cu.RuRoles_Code              -- role in the committee/meeting
FROM MtMeetingHeader AS m
INNER JOIN MtCommitteeHeader AS c
    ON m.MtCommitteeHeader_Id = c.MtCommitteeHeader_Id
INNER JOIN MtCommitteeUsers AS cu
    ON c.MtCommitteeHeader_Id = cu.MtCommitteeHeader_Id
INNER JOIN RuUsers AS u
    ON cu.RuUsers_Id = u.RuUsers_Id
WHERE m.MtMeetingHeader_Isdeleted = 0
  AND cu.MtCommitteeUsers_Isdeleted = 0
  AND u.RuUsers_IsDeleted = 0
  AND m.MtMeetingHeader_Id = (
        SELECT TOP 1 MtMeetingHeader_Id
        FROM MtMeetingHeader
        WHERE MtMeetingHeader_Isdeleted = 0
        ORDER BY MtMeetingHeader_MeetingDate DESC, MtMeetingHeader_Id DESC
  )
ORDER BY u.RuUsers_UserType, u.RuUsers_FirstName, u.RuUsers_LastName;
